rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.217 governs an Internet safety education program and has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
quote: Sec. 37.217. COMMUNITY EDUCATION RELATING TO INTERNET SAFETY.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and Internet safety education statute.
